TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ryuhanci, title = Ryuhanci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ryuhanci} }

S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Lyuhanci (lalu na theluw: ŚäČśľĘšĻč; lalu na ego: Joshua Liu; ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 4 squ kawas na 1991 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. malaysia hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga ŤôéÁČô.

panmwo:Infobox person Lyuhanci (lalu na theluw: ŚäČśľĘšĻč; lalu na ego: Joshua Liu; ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 4 squ kawas na 1991 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. malaysia hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga ŤôéÁČô.
